name: Half a Signature
text: Create one and a half 1/1 green and white Voter creature tokens. The half Voter has power and toughness 1/1 on the front and 0/0 on the back; flip the token over whenever someone at the table sighs. It counts as half a vote, which the rival mayor's recount clerk will absolutely contest.
flavorText: Bartholomew started signing, got distracted by the casserole, and never finished. He is one of our most reliable volunteers.

extras.halfThings: half a token, half a vote
